launchMessage: Welcome to ZobiView! Explore our collection of web tools and utilities.

theme.contentDescription: ZobiView is your gateway to a collection of useful web tools and resources, presented in a clean and accessible interface.

dailyMessages: Tip of the day: Stay curious and keep exploring!
Don't forget to check out our latest tools.
Have a productive day with ZobiView!
New features and tools are added regularly.

webViews.title: Mix Data Tools
webViews.descriptiveText: Access a variety of mixed data utilities.

webViews.title: CNIC Information
webViews.descriptiveText: USE VPN if site show error.

webViews.title: HD WhatsApp Profile Tool
webViews.descriptiveText: With this tool you can set WhatsApp profile in HD and its quality will not loose.

webViews.title: Designify Photo Editor
webViews.descriptiveText: Edit your pictures with Designify's powerful tools.
